## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Flosum and GrowthX teams to discuss content performance, pending tasks, and strategic alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/AfLNj95H8QKkxvMo5xWPP5jkAAnfxQm7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Impressions grew 58% this week, with clicks also rising despite the holiday week](https://fathom.video/share/AfLNj95H8QKkxvMo5xWPP5jkAAnfxQm7?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Backlink recommendations need urgent review by Flosum team (end of week latest)](https://fathom.video/share/AfLNj95H8QKkxvMo5xWPP5jkAAnfxQm7?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [New Looker report (V2) with granular article/cluster data expected soon](https://fathom.video/share/AfLNj95H8QKkxvMo5xWPP5jkAAnfxQm7?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Need to align content clusters with Flosum products for better engagement tracking](https://fathom.video/share/AfLNj95H8QKkxvMo5xWPP5jkAAnfxQm7?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Impressions increased by 58% this week](https://fathom.video/share/AfLNj95H8QKkxvMo5xWPP5jkAAnfxQm7?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Clicks are tracking higher than previous weeks, even mid-week](https://fathom.video/share/AfLNj95H8QKkxvMo5xWPP5jkAAnfxQm7?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [New Looker report (V2) in final stages, will provide more granular data on individual articles and clusters](https://fathom.video/share/AfLNj95H8QKkxvMo5xWPP5jkAAnfxQm7?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Current performance indicates positive trajectory in early publishing stage](https://fathom.video/share/AfLNj95H8QKkxvMo5xWPP5jkAAnfxQm7?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)

### Pending Tasks for Flosum Team

  - [Review backlink recommendations (highest priority, needed ASAP)](https://fathom.video/share/AfLNj95H8QKkxvMo5xWPP5jkAAnfxQm7?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Review refresh targets and knowledge-base counterpart opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/AfLNj95H8QKkxvMo5xWPP5jkAAnfxQm7?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [Matt to share insights from sales enablement training](https://fathom.video/share/AfLNj95H8QKkxvMo5xWPP5jkAAnfxQm7?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Matt to review technical errors and work on redirects by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/AfLNj95H8QKkxvMo5xWPP5jkAAnfxQm7?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)

### Content-Product Alignment

  - [Need to ensure topic clusters in Airtable align with Flosum products](https://fathom.video/share/AfLNj95H8QKkxvMo5xWPP5jkAAnfxQm7?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Beau requested ability to match visited URLs with specific products for engagement programs](https://fathom.video/share/AfLNj95H8QKkxvMo5xWPP5jkAAnfxQm7?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Jakub suggested adding a step in the publishing process to confirm product alignment](https://fathom.video/share/AfLNj95H8QKkxvMo5xWPP5jkAAnfxQm7?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Potential for automation to alert Beau about new content-product matches](https://fathom.video/share/AfLNj95H8QKkxvMo5xWPP5jkAAnfxQm7?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)

### AI Brand Monitoring Tools

  - [Matt inquired about Ahrefs' new AI brand radar feature](https://fathom.video/share/AfLNj95H8QKkxvMo5xWPP5jkAAnfxQm7?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [GrowthX team to evaluate Ahrefs offering against their own LLM tracking capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/AfLNj95H8QKkxvMo5xWPP5jkAAnfxQm7?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [Jakub to create a comparison matrix of available tools for LLM tracking](https://fathom.video/share/AfLNj95H8QKkxvMo5xWPP5jkAAnfxQm7?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)

### Technical Updates

  - [Jakub scheduled a review of technical errors with their technical director for Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/AfLNj95H8QKkxvMo5xWPP5jkAAnfxQm7?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Redirects work to be completed by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/AfLNj95H8QKkxvMo5xWPP5jkAAnfxQm7?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
